title: Yoga teaching years
metaDescription: Patricia Smith taught Yoga in Golden Bay from 2009 to 2021. A portrait of that chapter — and how it still informs her Kinesiology and Nutrition practice today.

blocks.text: A chapter that still shapes the work

blocks.html: For more than a decade Patricia taught accessible Hatha-based Yoga for physical, mental and emotional wellbeing — community classes, one-to-one sessions, workplaces and schools. She finished formal Yoga teacher training in 2011 and taught until 2021, when she stepped fully into Touch for Health Kinesiology and Nutrition.

Those years remain part of who she is as a practitioner: listening to bodies, meeting people where they are, and creating a steady, supportive space. She is grateful to the students who came and stayed — that relationship still flows into the sessions she offers now.
Yoga classes are no longer on offer. Today Patricia practises Touch for Health Kinesiology and Nutrition. You can book a session or get in touch.
